## Apple Extends Broadcom Chip Supply Partnership Through 2031 for AI Plans

A supply extension to 2031 is structurally positive for AVGO revenue visibility and partially offsets the valuation ceiling concern flagged in downgrade coverage (cluster 168df6d7953be020). It also confirms Apple's AI roadmap retains a meaningful third-party silicon dependency rather than moving fully in-house.

- Apple has extended its chip supply partnership with Broadcom through 2031.
- The extension is explicitly linked to Apple's future AI plans in the headline.
- A commitment through 2031 provides AVGO with multi-year, visible revenue from a major customer.
- High-confidence classifier tag; signals Apple's device-level AI silicon roadmap relies on AVGO components through the next decade.
